columns.name: AVDNR
columns.description: Account number associated with the order

columns.name: FKNR
columns.description: Unique file identifier for the transaction

columns.name: VAREGR
columns.description: Product group or category of the order item

columns.name: AARSAK
columns.description: Code indicating the reason for the transaction

columns.name: BELOP
columns.description: Financial amount associated with the order item or transaction

columns.name: TIDSPUNKT
columns.description: Time and date when the transaction occurred

columns.name: BRUKER
columns.description: Identifier for the user who initiated or performed the transaction

columns.name: TIDSPUNKT_VISMA
columns.description: Timestamp in the Visma system related to this transaction

columns.name: STATUS_VISMA
columns.description: Status of the transaction as recorded in the Visma system
